roles.description: Primary user — the CYFoods founder who buys, checks, packs, stocks, sells oil and records payments. Non-technical, mobile-first.
Read-only dashboard viewer who sees business performance metrics auto-generated from operator entries.

flows.description: Landing page showing quick stats (stock, owed, today's sales), 4 action buttons, and recent activity feed.
flows.goal: Get a quick overview of business status and navigate to key actions.

steps.description: Server-rendered page displays 3 stat cards (stock count, owed to me, sales today), 4 bento action buttons, and a list of up to 5 recent activities mixing sales and purchases.
steps.user_action: Browse stats and recent activity
steps.system_response: Renders real-time data from database
pain_points: Activity items are not clickable — no way to drill into a specific sale or purchase from here

findings.title: Activity items not interactive
findings.description: Recent activity cards show sales and purchases but are not clickable. Users cannot navigate to the detail of a specific sale or purchase from the home screen.
findings.recommendation: Wrap each activity item in a Link to /money/[saleId] for sales or /check/[purchaseId] for purchases.

findings.title: No quick path to Quality Check
findings.description: The 4 bento buttons cover Buy, Pack, Sell, Stock — but not Quality Check. After buying, the user is auto-redirected to /check, but there's no way to return to a pending check from the home screen.
findings.recommendation: Add a badge or alert on the home screen showing 'X purchases awaiting quality check' with a link.

flows.description: 3-step wizard to record a palm oil purchase: select supplier, enter kegs/price, take delivery photo.
flows.goal: Record a new oil purchase from a supplier with pricing and delivery documentation.

steps.description: Search or select from recent suppliers. Option to add a new supplier with name and location.
steps.user_action: Tap a supplier chip or fill 'Add new supplier' form
steps.system_response: Highlights selected supplier, enables Next button

steps.description: Inline form to create a new supplier with name and location. Auto-selects the new supplier after creation.
steps.user_action: Fill name + location, tap Add
steps.system_response: Creates supplier via POST /api/suppliers, auto-selects it
pain_points: No phone number field in the inline form — supplier phone is in schema but not collected here

steps.description: Set number of kegs (stepper), price per keg (₦ input), transport cost (₦ input). System auto-calculates total cost and cost per litre in a summary card.
steps.user_action: Adjust keg count, type price per keg and transport cost
steps.system_response: Real-time calculation of total cost and cost per litre in gradient summary card

steps.description: Camera button to photograph the delivery kegs. Optional waybill photo button. Trusted Delivery Verification badge.
steps.user_action: Tap camera button (or skip), tap 'Save Purchase'
steps.system_response: Creates purchase via POST /api/purchases, updates keg stock, redirects to quality check
pain_points: Camera is a placeholder — no actual photo capture or upload functionality implemented

findings.title: Photo capture not functional
findings.description: The camera button on Step 3 is a visual placeholder. No photo capture, file upload, or storage integration exists. The photoUrl field is never populated.
findings.recommendation: Implement file upload using <input type='file' accept='image/*' capture='environment'> with server-side storage (Supabase Storage or S3).

findings.title: Supplier phone number not collected
findings.description: The Supplier model has a phone field, but the inline 'Add new supplier' form only collects name and location.
findings.recommendation: Add a phone number input to the new supplier form.

findings.title: No purchase history or edit
findings.description: There is no way to view past purchases or edit a purchase after creation. The Buy nav link always starts a new purchase.
findings.recommendation: Add a purchase history view accessible from /buy, showing recent purchases with their status.

flows.description: Sensory quality assessment of a purchased batch: 4 yes/no tests followed by an accept/reject decision.
flows.goal: Determine if purchased oil meets quality standards before packing.

steps.description: 4 sensory tests displayed as cards: Colour (red-orange?), Smell (fresh?), Taste (right?), Water (at bottom?). Each has a green check and red X button.
steps.user_action: Tap check or X for each of 4 tests
steps.system_response: Toggles test result, visual feedback with filled button state
pain_points: Tests are not required — user can skip straight to decision buttons without testing

steps.description: 3 decision buttons: Accept (green), Accept with note (amber — shows textarea), Reject (red). Optional camera button for oil photo.
steps.user_action: Tap one of the 3 decision buttons
steps.system_response: POST /api/quality-checks, updates purchase status. If rejected, decrements stock. Redirects to home.

steps.description: Textarea appears for describing the issue. User types note and taps 'Save with note'.
steps.user_action: Type note, tap 'Save with note'
steps.system_response: Saves quality check with note, redirects to home

findings.title: Quality tests not enforced
findings.description: The user can tap Accept/Reject without answering any of the 4 quality test questions. The test results are sent as null.
findings.recommendation: Require all 4 tests to be answered before enabling decision buttons, or at minimum show a confirmation dialog.

findings.title: No reject follow-up action
findings.description: When oil is rejected, the user is sent home with no prompt to contact the supplier. The spec says 'If rejected, prompt to call supplier'.
findings.recommendation: After rejection, show a confirmation screen with a 'Call Supplier' button (tel: link) and WhatsApp option.

findings.title: No way to find pending quality checks
findings.description: If the user leaves the quality check page, there is no navigation path to return to pending checks. Only the auto-redirect from /buy leads here.
findings.recommendation: Show pending quality checks on the home screen or as a notification badge on the Buy tab.

flows.description: 3-step wizard to open kegs, fill bottles, reconcile litres, and set sell prices using the Smart Pricing Engine.
flows.goal: Convert bulk kegs into retail-sized bottles with optimal pricing.

steps.description: Shows accepted purchases. User selects one and chooses how many kegs to open. Displays litres available.
steps.user_action: Select purchase batch, adjust kegs to open
steps.system_response: Calculates litres available (kegs x 25L)
pain_points: No empty state guidance when no accepted purchases exist

steps.description: Grid of 6 bottle sizes (750ml-5L) with quantity selectors. Progress bar shows litres packed vs available. Warning when discrepancy exists.
steps.user_action: Set quantity for each bottle size
steps.system_response: Real-time litre reconciliation with progress bar and discrepancy warning

steps.description: For each bottle size with quantity > 0, shows PriceTierSelector with 3 tiers: Safe (5%), Good (10% — recommended), Strong (20%). User taps to select.
steps.user_action: Tap a price tier for each bottle size, then 'Finish & Save Batch'
steps.system_response: POST /api/packing creates PackingSession, updates BottlePricing, adjusts stock (kegs down, bottles up). Redirects to stock view.

findings.title: Can overfill bottles beyond available litres
findings.description: The bottle quantity selectors have no max constraint tied to available litres. User can enter 100 x 5L bottles when only 50L is available. The warning shows but doesn't prevent submission.
findings.recommendation: Either cap bottle quantities so total packed cannot exceed available litres, or require user confirmation when discrepancy > 5%.

flows.description: Read-only inventory dashboard showing bulk kegs and packed bottles with quantities, litres, and values.
flows.goal: Check current inventory levels and identify low-stock items.

steps.description: Shows bulk kegs (count, litres, value) and packed bottles grid (per size with count, value). Low stock badge on items < 10. Fixed bottom summary bar with total litres and value.
steps.user_action: Browse (read-only)
steps.system_response: Server-rendered stock data
pain_points: No action buttons — can't initiate a restock (buy) or pack session from here

findings.title: No stock confirmation or problem reporting
findings.description: The spec says the operator should 'confirm physical count matches system count' and 'flag problems: leaking, spoilage, storage issues'. This feature is not implemented.
findings.recommendation: Add a 'Confirm Stock' button and a 'Report Problem' flow for spoilage/leaking/discrepancy.

findings.title: No quick restock action
findings.description: When stock is low, there's no shortcut to start a Buy or Pack flow.
findings.recommendation: Add contextual action buttons: 'Buy More' on low keg stock, 'Pack More' on low bottle stock.

flows.description: 2-step flow to record a sale: pick a customer and select products with quantities.
flows.goal: Record an oil sale to a customer with automatic profit calculation.

steps.description: Search existing customers or add new. Shows customer chips with 'Regular' or 'Owes ₦X' badges. Selected customer shows context card with last order info.
steps.user_action: Tap a customer chip or fill 'Add new customer' form
steps.system_response: Shows selected customer context (last order, usual sizes, outstanding balance)

steps.description: Shows bottle sizes with pre-filled prices from Pack phase. Quantity selectors per size. Delivery method toggle (Pickup/Deliver). Fixed footer shows total, profit, margin %, and Complete Sale button.
steps.user_action: Set quantities per bottle size, choose delivery, tap Complete Sale
steps.system_response: POST /api/sales creates Sale + SaleItems, decrements stock, redirects to payment recording
pain_points: No complaint field — spec says there should be a 'Complaints field: None / Yes (describe)'

findings.title: No complaint recording
findings.description: The spec requires a complaint field linked back to source supplier for traceability. The Sale model has complaint and complaintText fields but the UI doesn't expose them.
findings.recommendation: Add a 'Any complaint?' toggle at the bottom of the sell form with a text input that appears when Yes is selected.

findings.title: No wholesale (25L keg) option
findings.description: The spec says 'Sometimes CYFoods sells full 25L kegs directly without repackaging'. The sell form only shows bottle sizes from BottlePricing, not 25L keg option.
findings.recommendation: Add a '25L Keg' option to the product selector when keg stock is available, with pricing from the purchase cost + margin.

findings.title: No stock validation on sale
findings.description: User can sell more bottles than are in stock. The API decrements stock but doesn't check if sufficient stock exists.
findings.recommendation: Show available stock next to each bottle size and prevent selling more than available.

flows.description: Payment tracking dashboard showing outstanding balances and recently paid sales.
flows.goal: See who owes money and track collection progress.

steps.description: Shows 2 summary cards (Owed to me, Collected). Lists unpaid sales grouped as 'Awaiting Payment' and paid sales as 'Recently Paid'. Each card is clickable to record payment.
steps.user_action: Tap an unpaid sale to record payment
steps.system_response: Navigates to /money/[saleId]

flows.description: Record a payment against a sale: enter amount, select method, set expected date, generate WhatsApp reminder.
flows.goal: Track how much a customer paid and manage outstanding balances.

steps.description: Context card shows customer name, sale items, total. Currency input for amount paid. Quick select buttons (Paid in full / Half / No payment). Payment method pills (Cash/Transfer/POS). Balance owed display. Expected payment date (conditional). Profit breakdown. WhatsApp reminder button.
steps.user_action: Enter amount or tap quick-select, choose payment method, optionally set date and send WhatsApp reminder, tap 'Save & Done'
steps.system_response: POST /api/payments creates Payment record. Calculates balance and status (PAID/PART/OWED). Redirects to /sell.
pain_points: Redirect goes to /sell after saving — should go to /money or / instead

steps.description: Date picker appears when balance remains. WhatsApp reminder button generates contextual message with sale details and due date.
steps.user_action: Pick a date, optionally tap WhatsApp reminder
steps.system_response: Opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message via wa.me deep link

findings.title: Post-save redirect goes to /sell instead of /money
findings.description: After saving a payment, the user is redirected to /sell which is unexpected. They should return to the money overview or home.
findings.recommendation: Change redirect after payment save to /money (payment overview) or / (home).

findings.title: No multiple payment support
findings.description: If a customer makes a second partial payment on the same sale, there's no way to record it. The flow only handles one payment per sale visit.
findings.recommendation: Show payment history on the money detail page and allow recording additional payments.

findings.title: No WhatsApp escalation tones
findings.description: The spec calls for escalating reminder tones: polite → firm → final notice based on days overdue. Currently only one tone is used.
findings.recommendation: Generate different message templates based on days overdue (0-7: polite, 8-14: firm, 15+: final notice).

flows.description: Customer list with search, filters, and Customer Pulse alerts for inactive regulars.
flows.goal: View all customers, identify who owes money, and re-engage inactive regulars.

steps.description: Shows total customer count, search bar, filter pills (All/Owe Money/Regulars/New). Customer cards with initials avatar, name, location, total spent. Orange border on customers with debt. Customer Pulse banner for inactive regulars with WhatsApp CTA.
steps.user_action: Browse, search, filter, tap a customer, or tap WhatsApp on pulse alert
steps.system_response: Server-rendered customer list with calculated stats
pain_points: Search is server-rendered — no client-side filtering, requires page reload
Filter pills are rendered but non-functional (no filter logic)

findings.title: Filter pills non-functional
findings.description: The filter pills (All, Owe Money, Regulars, New) are rendered as static buttons but have no click handlers or filtering logic.
findings.recommendation: Implement client-side filtering or convert to a client component with state-based filtering.

findings.title: Search not interactive
findings.description: The search input exists but is rendered on a server component — typing doesn't filter results.
findings.recommendation: Convert to a client component with debounced search, or use searchParams-based server filtering.

flows.description: Comprehensive customer profile with stats, payment reliability, order history, and action buttons.
flows.goal: Understand a customer's buying patterns, payment reliability, and outstanding balance.

steps.description: Large initials avatar, name, location, phone. Call and WhatsApp buttons. Stats grid (orders, spent, avg). Payment reliability bar. 'Usually Buys' product chips. Outstanding balance card with reminder. Recent orders list.
steps.user_action: Browse profile, tap Call/WhatsApp, tap Send Reminder, tap New Sale
steps.system_response: Server-rendered customer data with calculated reliability %
pain_points: New Sale button links to /sell but doesn't pre-select this customer

findings.title: New Sale doesn't pre-select customer
findings.description: The 'New Sale to [customer]' CTA links to /sell but the sell page doesn't read a customer parameter — the user has to search for the customer again.
findings.recommendation: Pass customer ID as a query parameter (/sell?customerId=X) and auto-select in the sell page.

flows.description: Read-only business performance dashboard with KPIs, charts, tables, and risk flags for investors.
flows.goal: View business health metrics auto-generated from operator daily entries.

steps.description: Desktop/tablet optimized. 4 KPI cards (Revenue, Gross Profit, Cash Collected, Outstanding Debts). 2-col charts (Revenue & Profit Trend, Revenue by Product Size). 2-col tables (Top 5 Customers, Supplier Quality Scorecard). Risk flags section.
steps.user_action: Browse (read-only)
steps.system_response: Server-rendered 30-day business analytics
pain_points: Nav tabs (Financials, Operations) are displayed but non-functional
No date range picker — always shows 30 days

findings.title: Navigation tabs are non-functional
findings.description: The Investor Dashboard header shows 'Financials' and 'Operations' nav tabs but they have no click handlers and don't navigate anywhere.
findings.recommendation: Either implement the additional views or remove the tabs to avoid confusion.

findings.title: No date range picker
findings.description: The spec requires a date range picker. Dashboard always shows last 30 days with no way to change the time period.
findings.recommendation: Add a date range selector (preset options: 7d, 30d, 90d, custom) that filters all dashboard data.

findings.title: No export or print
findings.description: The spec says 'exportable/printable'. No export or print functionality exists.
findings.recommendation: Add CSV export for tables and a print-friendly CSS stylesheet.

findings.title: No authentication gate
findings.description: The /investor route is publicly accessible. Any visitor can see business financials. NextAuth is configured but no route guard exists.
findings.recommendation: Add middleware or server-side auth check to restrict /investor to users with INVESTOR role.

flows.description: NextAuth is configured with phone/email credentials, but no login UI or route guards exist yet.
flows.goal: Authenticate users and restrict access by role.

steps.description: NextAuth is configured with a CredentialsProvider for phone/email + password, but no /login page exists. Auth callbacks set role and ID on the session.
steps.user_action: N/A
steps.system_response: N/A
pain_points: Entire auth UI is missing — no login page, no logout, no route guards

findings.title: No login page or route guards
findings.description: NextAuth is configured with credentials provider, session callbacks, and seed users, but no /login page exists and no routes are protected. All pages are publicly accessible.
findings.recommendation: Create /login page with phone/email input + password. Add middleware to protect operator routes and /investor route. Add logout button to TopBar.

cross_flow_findings.title: No authentication or route protection
cross_flow_findings.description: All pages are publicly accessible. NextAuth is configured but never enforced. Business data (financials, customers, suppliers) is exposed to anyone with the URL.
cross_flow_findings.recommendation: Implement login page, protect all operator routes with session check, protect /investor with role check.

cross_flow_findings.title: Photo upload not implemented anywhere
cross_flow_findings.description: The Buy flow (delivery photo, waybill photo) and Quality Check flow (oil photo) have camera buttons that are visual placeholders with no actual file upload or storage.
cross_flow_findings.recommendation: Implement file input with camera capture, upload to server storage, and save URL to database.

cross_flow_findings.title: Inconsistent post-save redirects
cross_flow_findings.description: After saving: Buy → /check (good), Pack → /stock (good), Sell → /money/[id] (good), Money → /sell (bad — should go to /money or /). Quality Check → / (acceptable). No consistent pattern.
cross_flow_findings.recommendation: Standardize: after any save, redirect to the natural 'next step' in the value chain or back to the overview of the current section.

cross_flow_findings.title: No offline support (PWA)
cross_flow_findings.description: The spec lists offline mode as 'NON-NEGOTIABLE for Nigerian infrastructure'. manifest.json exists but no service worker, IndexedDB, or sync queue is implemented.
cross_flow_findings.recommendation: Implement service worker for caching, IndexedDB for offline data entry, and a sync queue that replays API calls when connectivity returns.

cross_flow_findings.title: No edit or delete capability for any entity
cross_flow_findings.description: No purchase, sale, payment, or customer can be edited or deleted after creation. If the operator makes a mistake, there's no way to correct it.
cross_flow_findings.recommendation: Add edit flows for purchases (before quality check), sales, and customer details. Consider soft-delete with audit trail.

cross_flow_findings.title: Mixed client/server component patterns for similar pages
cross_flow_findings.description: Customers list is server-rendered (no interactive features work), while Sell page is client-rendered with similar search/filter needs. No consistent pattern for when to use server vs client.
cross_flow_findings.recommendation: Convert customer list to a client component for interactive search and filters, matching the sell page pattern.

top_recommendations.title: Implement authentication and route protection
top_recommendations.impact: Security — all business data is currently publicly accessible
top_recommendations.description: Create /login page, add middleware to protect operator routes, protect /investor with role check, add logout button.

top_recommendations.title: Implement photo upload and storage
top_recommendations.impact: Core feature — delivery proof and quality documentation cannot be captured
top_recommendations.description: Wire camera buttons to file inputs with capture attribute, implement server-side storage, save URLs to database.

top_recommendations.title: Add offline support (service worker + IndexedDB)
top_recommendations.impact: Critical for Nigerian infrastructure — app is unusable without internet
top_recommendations.description: Implement service worker caching, IndexedDB for offline data entry, and API call sync queue.

top_recommendations.title: Make customer filters and search functional
top_recommendations.impact: Usability — search and filter are visible but non-functional, causing confusion
top_recommendations.description: Convert customer list to client component, implement debounced search and filter state.

top_recommendations.title: Add wholesale 25L keg sales and complaint recording
top_recommendations.impact: Missing business flows from the spec — wholesale path and quality traceability
top_recommendations.description: Add 25L keg to sell form, add complaint toggle with text input, link complaints to supplier.
